channel.title: Comments on: 2008 Flour City Brew Fest
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Brian S
item.dc:creator: Brian S
item.description: This is such a great event...its nice to get to view it all over again. Can't wait till next year!!
item.content:encoded: This is such a great event…its nice to get to view it all over again. Can’t wait till next year!!

item.title: By: Tony G
item.dc:creator: Tony G
item.description: I was at this! Nothing like good beer and a good crowd on a summer night in Rochester!
item.content:encoded: I was at this! Nothing like good beer and a good crowd on a summer night in Rochester!
